overview: Copies or moves files from one location to another within the pipeline. Files are copied or moved into the location specified in the output settings tabs. Takes raw documents and sends raw documents, acting as a pass-through for the document content itself.
processingNotes: Files are copied or moved into the location specified in the **output settings tabs**, not via step-level path parameters.
Three copy-protection modes are available: overwrite existing files, backup existing files before copy/move, or skip when a file already exists at the output location.
An option exists to move files (deleting the source) instead of copying them.
